svg.title: Document Co-Pilot architecture diagram
svg.desc: Two-section SVG showing the current local RAG pipeline from PDF upload through Streamlit, chunking, embedding, OpenSearch, retrieval, and GPT generation, plus a future AWS architecture with S3, Lambda, OpenSearch Service, ECS, and OpenAI API.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with the system?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit UI do?')
sendPrompt('How does text chunking work in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenSearch k-NN indexing work?')
sendPrompt('How is a user query embedded?')
sendPrompt('How does GPT generate answers from context?')
sendPrompt('How does S3 event-driven ingestion work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda ingestion function do?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI run on ECS Fargate?')
sendPrompt('How does the user access the FastAPI app?')
sendPrompt('How is the OpenAI API called in production?')
sendPrompt('Why use AWS Secrets Manager for API keys?')
sendPrompt('What would the CI/CD pipeline look like?')
